message:
fix(ui): gate rich UI modules for Unix only

The rich terminal UI modules (status, workers, probe, benchmark, config)
use RchTheme methods that are only available on Unix. Gate these modules
and their exports with #[cfg(unix)] to prevent compilation errors on Windows.

Also fix hook.rs rich-ui block to use #[cfg(all(feature = "rich-ui", unix))]
since it calls RchTheme::success() and RchTheme::error() methods.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
